/usr/bin/ar qc ../../Lib/libmpp.a  CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Audio.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Audio_coder.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Camera.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Capture.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/MotionDetect.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/MotionTrack.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Motor.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/QrCode.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Sys.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Wdt.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/src/Wifi.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/libdmc/libdmc.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/src/rv1106_dual_ipc/audio/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/src/rv1106_dual_ipc/video/video.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/isp/rv1106/isp.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/common.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/socket_server/server.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/socket_server/socket.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/param/awb_calib.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/param/dictionary.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/param/iniparser.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/param/param.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/system/system.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/rtsp/rtsp.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/rtmp/rtmp.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/osd/bmp_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/osd/color_table.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/osd/draw_paint.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/osd/font_factory.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/osd/osd.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/roi/roi.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/Hostapd.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/RK_encode.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/Rk_wifi.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/gbk_to_utf8.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/network.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/ntp.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/utf8_to_gbk.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/network/utility.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/storage/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/rockiva/rockiva.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/event/event.c.o CMakeFiles/mpp.dir/rkipc/common/region_clip/region_clip.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../Lib/libmpp.a
